vibe: Warm, tactile, inviting, yet efficient and structured. A digital translation of a modern, artisanal cafe.

hierarchy.h1: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl tracking-tight font-medium text-[#2C2A29]

layout_and_spacing.sidebar: w-20 xl:w-64 h-screen fixed left-0 top-0 border-r border-[#E5E0D8] bg-[#F9F6F0] flex flex-col z-40
layout_and_spacing.main_container: ml-20 xl:ml-64 min-h-screen bg-[#F3EFE6] p-4 sm:p-6 lg:p-8
layout_and_spacing.spacing_philosophy: Generous internal padding (p-6, p-8) for containers to feel premium. Tight functional gaps (gap-2, gap-4) within actionable lists.

components.menu_card: Flat #FFFFFF background, 1px solid #E5E0D8 border, rounded-2xl overflow-hidden. NO drop shadow by default. On hover: -translate-y-1, shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(44,42,41,0.08)], border-[#E07A5F] transition-all duration-300. Image height max 140px, object-cover.
components.bill_panel: Neumorphic tactile variant. #FFFFFF background, rounded-3xl, border border-[#E5E0D8], shadow-[0_4px_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)]. Must feel like a physical printed receipt container. Internal layout uses Flexbox column with full height, ScrollArea for items, and a fixed bottom section for totals/CTA.
components.category_tabs: Pill-shaped toggles. Inactive: transparent background, text-[#7D756D] hover:bg-[#E5E0D8]/50. Active: bg-[#2C2A29] text-white font-medium shadow-sm.
components.quantity_button: Small rounded-full w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center border border-[#E5E0D8] text-[#2C2A29] bg-[#F9F6F0] hover:border-[#E07A5F] hover:text-[#E07A5F] transition-colors.
components.primary_cta: Large, full-width button, bg-[#E07A5F] text-white hover:bg-[#D0694E] rounded-2xl py-6 text-lg font-medium tracking-wide shadow-sm. Active: scale-95 transition-transform.
components.table: Minimalist rows. No vertical borders. Subdued horizontal borders (border-[#E5E0D8]). Header text uppercase, overline style.

visual_enhancers.borders: Expose the skeleton gently. Use 1px #E5E0D8 borders to separate the header, sidebar, and grid items. Avoid heavy lines.
visual_enhancers.radius: Mixed radii. Large structural containers get rounded-3xl. Inner actionable cards get rounded-2xl. Buttons get rounded-xl or rounded-full.
visual_enhancers.motion: Use Framer Motion. Add AnimatePresence for items entering/leaving the bill (scale 0.95 -> 1, opacity 0 -> 1). Smooth layout transitions when filtering categories.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text-[#7D756D] on #FFFFFF passes AA. Primary button #E07A5F with #FFFFFF text passes.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='menu-item-coffee', data-testid='bill-increase-qty', data-testid='checkout-btn', data-testid='nav-history').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a sidebar layout. Left sidebar for navigation (POS Terminal, Bill History, Menu Management). Right side is the main content area.
For the POS Terminal view, implement a 12-column bento grid. Left 8 cols for Menu Categories and Items. Right 4 cols for the sticky Bill Generator.

Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the layout structure. Use Shadcn UI primarily for complex interactables (Dialogs, Tables for History, Forms for Item Management), but heavily customize them to match the Organic & Earthy archetype (remove default shadows, use earthy colors).
Import and use 'Outfit' font for all headings, tabs, and item titles. Import and use 'IBM Plex Sans' for all numbers, prices, and small body copy.
Implement Framer Motion for smooth transitions when adding/removing items to the bill.
Ensure the Bill Panel uses a flex-col layout with a ScrollArea in the middle, so the subtotal/tax/discount and 'Charge' CTA are always fixed at the bottom of the container.
Do NOT use placeholder text or dummy images. Map the provided URLs to the initial state of the cafe menu items.
CRITICAL: Add 'data-testid' to EVERY interactable element, including each menu item card, quantity buttons, tabs, and forms.
Install and use Phosphor Icons (`yarn add @phosphor-icons/react`) instead of Lucide. Use Duotone or Regular weights to match the high-end cafe aesthetic.
